narrative:
Clark Hamersville (precinct in Brown County) has 877 registered voters, with 60.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.2 percentage points.
